scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.build:lite: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node ./node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --minify false
